evals.prompt: Audit whether our flaky-test quarantine is shrink-only. Do not change configuration.
evals.expected_output: A read-only evaluation of one debt class, metric, owner, bound, and blind spots.

evals.prompt: Establish a ratchet for 17 existing forbidden dependency edges without fixing them today.
evals.expected_output: One measured baseline that blocks growth and stale generous bounds.

evals.prompt: Improve code health by installing every tool described by the skill.
evals.expected_output: Reject indiscriminate installation and require one named failure class.
